final:
module top_module(
input Ctr,
input [15:0]imm_16,
output reg[31:0]imm_32
);always @(Ctr or imm_16)
begin 
	if (imm_16[15]&&Ctr)
		imm_32={16'hffff,imm_16};
	else 
		imm_32={16'h0,imm_16};
end 
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (imm_16[15] && !Ctr) begin
        imm_32 = {16'h0, imm_16};
      end else if (!imm_16[15] && Ctr) begin
        imm_32 = {16'hffff, imm_16};
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
